content: Hi, I'm Spencer and I'm a Veterinarian at a rural practice. I just got back from a trip to the UK and I'm still on a high from all the amazing experiences I had.
Welcome back, Spencer! The UK is an incredible country. What were some of your favorite experiences from your trip?
Definitely the hiking in the Scottish Highlands and trying all the local foods, like fish and chips. I also visited my friend, Emily, in London and we had a blast exploring the city together.
That sounds amazing! I've heard great things about the Scottish Highlands. Did you try any new outdoor activities while you were traveling?
Actually, yes! I tried knitting for the first time in a small town in rural Scotland. It was such a unique experience and I ended up buying a knitting kit to try it out back home in Wisconsin.
That's so cool! I've never met anyone who's into knitting before. Are you planning on doing any more hiking or knitting trips in the near future?
Yes, I'm actually planning a trip to the Smoky Mountains with my family to do some hiking and camping. We're thinking of going in October, depending on our schedules.
The Smoky Mountains are a beautiful range. Have you and your family traveled together before?
Yes, we've taken a few trips together, including a road trip out to Yellowstone last year. We had a blast and I'm sure we'll have a great time on this trip too.
That sounds like a lot of fun. What do you like to do to relax and unwind after a long day of work at your veterinary practice?
I actually really enjoy listening to podcasts and playing board games in my spare time. It's a great way to relieve stress and have some fun.
That's really cool! I wouldn't have guessed that you're into podcasts and board games. Do you have any favorite podcasts or games that you like to play?
Yeah, I'm actually a big fan of true crime podcasts and I love playing Scrabble. I'm also really into puzzle games like chess and Sudoku.
That sounds like a lot of fun. I'm sure you'll have a great time on your next trip and playing your favorite games. It was great chatting with you about your travels and hobbies.
Thanks, I will! It was great talking to you too. I'm looking forward to my next adventure and playing some more games.
